overall.description: A cinematic third-person perspective from a video game showing a character standing in tall grass at the edge of a foggy forest at night. The character faces a distant settlement with glowing orange lights, a large gnarled tree stump, and silhouetted mountains under an overcast sky with flying birds.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy forest clearing overlooking distant settlement

events.description: character raises right hand toward face, possibly adjusting equipment or radio

agents.ego_description: standing motionless in tall grass at forest edge, surveying the foggy valley and distant illuminated structures

entered.detail: large dead tree trunk with gnarled branches silhouetted against the foggy background
leafless trees with twisted branches framing the left side of the view
dark pine trees forming a dense silhouette on the right horizon
warm orange glowing lights from buildings visible through the fog in the valley
dark silhouetted mountains rising in the background
narrow dirt track running along the right side of the grassy area
vertical wooden posts marking the boundary of the path
birds circling and flying through the foggy sky

segments.scene_description: The character stands in dense tall grass at the edge of a foggy forest, facing a wide valley with a large gnarled tree stump in the center distance. Bare trees frame the left side while a dirt path runs along the right. Warm orange lights glow from a distant settlement through the mist, with mountains silhouetted against the cloudy night sky. Birds fly overhead in the fog. Around the 48-second mark, the character briefly raises a hand toward their face.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady camera perspective from the edge of a foggy forest looking out across a wide, atmospheric valley at night. It begins with the character standing in dense tall grass, framed by bare trees on the left and a dirt path on the right. As the gaze extends into the distance, the mist reveals a large gnarled tree stump centered in the valley and the warm orange glow of a distant settlement. The scene then expands toward the horizon where silhouetted mountains sit under a cloudy sky and birds drift through the fog, before the character briefly raises a hand toward their face.
